mapper.update: UPDATE article SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, c.name as category_name, c.slug as category_slug FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content_md LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, c.name as category_name, c.slug as category_slug FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND c.slug = #{slug} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, c.name as category_name, c.slug as category_slug FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id JOIN article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id JOIN tag t ON at.tag_id = t.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND t.slug = #{slug} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
